top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0 <= 3 THEN 'short'
        WHEN Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0 <= 5 THEN 'medium'
        ELSE 'long'
    END AS duration_category,
    MIN(Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0) AS min_time_minutes,
    MAX(Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0) AS max_time_minutes,
    SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM Track t
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY duration_category;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0 <= 3 THEN 'short'
        WHEN Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0 <= 5 THEN 'medium'
        ELSE 'long'
    END AS duration_category,
    MIN(Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0) AS min_time_minutes,
    MAX(Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0) AS max_time_minutes,
    SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM Track t
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY duration_category;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Milliseconds / 60000.0 <= 3 THEN 'short'
        WHEN Milliseconds / 60000.0 <= 5 THEN 'medium'
        ELSE 'long'
    END AS duration_category,
    ROUND(MIN(Milliseconds / 60000.0), 2) AS min_time_minutes,
    ROUND(MAX(Milliseconds / 60000.0), 2) AS max_time_minutes,
    ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Track t
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY duration_category;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0 <= 3 THEN 'short'
        WHEN Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0 <= 5 THEN 'medium'
        ELSE 'long'
    END AS duration_category,
    MIN(Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0) AS min_time_minutes,
    MAX(Milliseconds / 1000.0 / 60.0) AS max_time_minutes,
    SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM Track t
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY duration_category;
